data.name: FURRY SUMMER
data.detailed_description:
Every great show has a beach episode. Welcome to yours.

Furry Summer is a scorching hot arcade brick-breaker that trades heavy armor for skimpy swimsuits and sandy beaches. You've booked a one-way ticket to the ultimate tropical resort, and the local anthro girls are more than ready to help you beat the heat.

The sun is shining, the tide is high, and it's time to play. Grab your paddle, keep your beach balls bouncing, and smash through the barriers. Every stage you clear strips away the winter coats and unlocks steaming hot, fully animated encounters with a cast of gorgeous furry babes.

🌴 Summer Vacation Itinerary:

  • The Ultimate Beach Episode: Enjoy high-quality, uncensored videos featuring pure M/F (Male/Female) furry action. These girls are panting in the heat, and they need your help to cool down.

  • Scorching Arcade Action: Classic physics-based brick-breaking. Ride the waves, handle your paddle with care, and don't let the balls drop.

  • Slippery Upgrades: Catch refreshing power-ups to enhance your gameplay. Unleash multi-balls, explosive impacts, and wave-clearing bonuses.

  • Private Cabana Gallery: A dedicated gallery mode to replay your favorite unlocked scenes. Sit back, relax, and enjoy the sunset.

  • One-Handed Relaxation: Simple mouse controls mean you can play with one hand, leaving the other free to... hold your tropical drink.

The temperature is rising, and the swimsuits are coming off. Dive in.

data.short_description: Welcome to the ultimate furry beach episode! A scorching hot arcade breaker where you smash blocks to unlock explicit, uncensored videos of gorgeous anthro girls. Grab your paddle, keep your beach balls bouncing, and dive deep into pure M/F summer fun.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+ or later
  • 處理器: Dual-core 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or discrete GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
